must_detect.matched_text: Parties: Hoshizora Robotics KK (TSE Growth, Japan-incorporated kabushiki kaisha) as Buyer; Akiba Systems KK (unlisted) as Target; Kikyo Finance GK as financing provider.
Structure: Friendly acquisition by TOB (kōkai kaitsuke) followed by squeeze-out procedures under the Companies Act; no merger ratio set at this stage.
Structure: Friendly acquisition by TOB (kōkai kaitsuke) followed by squeeze-out procedures under the Companies Act; no merger ratio set at this stage.

Financing: Non-public committed bridge facility from Kikyo Finance GK for internal planning purposes; no public offering or share issuance contemplated at signing; any equity financing, if later considered, will be announced in accordance with TSE rules.

Financing: Non-public committed bridge facility from Kikyo Finance GK for internal planning purposes; no public offering or share issuance contemplated at signing; any equity financing, if later considered, will be announced in accordance with TSE rules.

Financing: Non-public committed bridge facility from Kikyo Finance GK for internal planning purposes; no public offering or share issuance contemplated at signing; any equity financing, if later considered, will be announced in accordance with TSE rules.

Employment matters: Continuity for Target employees is the current intent as previously communicated in FAQs on the public IR site; any changes in terms will be disclosed after closing if and as required by law.

Trading policy and blackout: Per the publicly posted trading policy, Buyer’s blackout runs from quarter-end until earnings release; the next expected blackout aligns with FY2026 Q1 results per the IR calendar; insider trading restrictions under FIEA apply.

Governing law and forum: Japan law governs; exclusive jurisdiction Tokyo District Court; this term sheet is non-binding except for customary confidentiality and costs, and is superseded upon execution of a definitive agreement.
